howToCreateRequest: How do I create a cargo request?
howToCreateRequestAnswer: Navigate to the Create tab, fill in cargo details, set price, and submit. Carriers will then send bids for your cargo.
howToSubmitBid: How do I submit a bid?
howToSubmitBidAnswer: As a carrier, browse active cargo requests, compare offers, and submit your bid with your price and message.
howPaymentWorksAnswer: Payment uses secure escrow. Your payment is held until delivery is confirmed. Carriers receive payment only after successful delivery.
howToTrackOrder: How can I track my order?
howToTrackOrderAnswer: Once a bid is accepted, you can track the cargo in real-time using GPS. Chat directly with the carrier for updates.
whatIfCarrierLate: What if the carrier is late?
whatIfCarrierLateAnswer: Contact the carrier immediately via chat. If the issue persists, contact our support team for assistance.
canICancelOrderAnswer: You can cancel before a bid is accepted. Once accepted, cancellation requires carrier consent and may incur fees.
startUsingApp: Start using the app to see your statistics here
enterBidMessage: Enter your message and proposal details
fillBidFields: Please fill in bid amount and message

step1.title: Create Cargo Request
step1.description: Post your cargo with pickup, delivery, and weight details. Get quotes from verified carriers.

step2.title: Receive and Compare Bids
step2.description: Carriers submit bids. Compare prices, ratings, and choose the best one.

step3.title: Communicate and Track
step3.description: Chat directly with carrier. Track shipment in real-time with GPS.

step4.title: Secure Payment
step4.description: Payment held in escrow until delivery. Your money is safe.

step1.title: Find Cargo Requests
step1.description: Browse active cargo requests. Filter by location, type, and weight.

step2.title: Submit Bids
step2.description: Set your price and add a message. Show why you're the best choice.

step3.title: Start Transport
step3.description: Once your bid is accepted, pick up the cargo and deliver safely.

step4.title: Build Reputation
step4.description: Get positive reviews and increase your rating. Higher rating = more jobs.

customer.title: No Orders Yet
customer.description: Create your first cargo request to receive bids from carriers.
tips: Include cargo photos for better bids

carrier.title: No Jobs Yet
carrier.description: Search for active cargo requests and submit bids to start earning.
tips: Offer competitive prices to stand out
Keep your profile updated with vehicle information

messages.title: No Messages
messages.description: When you accept bids or send requests, conversations will appear here.
tips: Chat is automatically enabled when a bid is accepted
You can share photos and documents in chat
Reply quickly for better customer satisfaction

all.title: No Active Requests
all.description: There are no active cargo requests right now. Check back later or create your own.

my.title: You Have No Requests
my.description: Create your first cargo request to receive bids from verified carriers.
tips: Add more details for more accurate bids
Use photos to give carriers better overview
Set appropriate timeframe for pickup and delivery

selectCargoType: Select the type of cargo you want to ship
titleMinLength: Title must be at least 3 characters
titleMaxLength: Title cannot be longer than 100 characters
descriptionMinLength: Description must be at least 10 characters
descriptionMaxLength: Description cannot be longer than 500 characters
weightMaxExceeded: Weight cannot be greater than 50000 kg
dimensionsMaxLength: Dimensions cannot be longer than 50 characters
fromAddressMinLength: From address must be at least 3 characters
toAddressMinLength: To address must be at least 3 characters
priceMaxExceeded: Price cannot be greater than 1,000,000 NOK
followDriverLive: Follow the driver location in real time.
